get.description: Retrieve complete profile information of the authenticated user.

patch.description: Update profile information. All fields are optional - only provide fields to update.

get.description: Retrieve dashboard data for the authenticated user. This endpoint requires authentication and authorization to access.

post.description: Create a new client account with email, password, and personal information.

400.description: Validation error or email already exists

post.description: Create a new technician account. After registration, complete the 5-step verification process.
Login using registered email and password credentials.
post.summary: Authenticate user with email and password

post.description: Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token.
post.summary: Get new access token using refresh token

post.description: Logout from current session and invalidate the refresh token.
Send OTP code to registered email for password reset.
Verify the OTP code sent to email.
Send verification email link to authenticated user to verify their email address.

get.description: Click link in verification email to verify email address.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Email verification token from email link

get.summary: Redirect to Google OAuth consent screen

get.description: Handles OAuth callback from Google and returns auth tokens.

302.description: Redirect to frontend with tokens in query parameters

get.summary: Get technician profile and registration details
Get all users (paginated, filter by role)
Get emergency numbers (paginated, filter by type)

post.summary: [Client] Submit a review for a completed request

get.summary: Get all reviews for a technician
Get all reviews for a service

info.title: Osta API
info.description: Home services marketplace — connecting clients with verified technicians

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Register, login, tokens, Google OAuth, OTP

email.description: Registered email address to receive OTP
Email address registered for password reset

otp.description: One-time password (6 digits sent to email)

categoryId.description: MongoDB ID of the service category

serviceIds.description: Array of MongoDB IDs of selected services

hasTools.description: Does the technician have their own tools

hasTransportation.description: Does the technician have their own transportation

serviceAreas.description: List of service areas where technician can work

canWorkOutsideArea.description: Can the technician work outside their service areas

description.example: All plumbing related services including pipe fixing, installation, etc.

image.description: Category image URL or file path

isActive.description: Whether the category is active and visible

includes.description: What is included in the service

doesNotInclude.description: What is not included in the service

description.example: Professional pipe fixing, replacement and installation service

category.description: MongoDB ID of the category this service belongs to

fixingSteps.description: Service details including what is included and excluded

isActive.description: Whether this service is active and available

userId.description: MongoDB ID of the user leaving comment (auto-filled)

userName.description: Name of the user leaving comment (auto-filled)

reason.description: Reason for rejecting the technician registration

message.description: User message to send to the AI assistant
message.example: How can I find a plumber near me?

title.description: Brief title of the service request

description.description: Detailed description of the service needed
description.example: Water is leaking from the main pipe under the bathroom sink

categoryId.description: MongoDB ID of the service category

serviceId.description: MongoDB ID of the specific service

preferredTime.description: Preferred time for service (HH:mm or h:mm AM/PM)

phone.description: Phone number for the emergency service

icon.description: Icon URL for the emergency type

requestId.description: MongoDB ID of the completed service request

comment.example: Excellent service, very professional and punctual
